name: VR Dunk Assistant
short_description: This game allows you to practice shooting from the comfort of your home, providing an immersive basketball experience and helping you improve your shooting skills anytime, anywhere.
detailed_description:
This is a VR basketball practice game designed for basketball enthusiasts, offering an immersive and realistic shooting experience. The game records your score and accuracy in real time, helping you continuously improve your shooting skills.

Game Rules

  • Scoring 2 points for shots made inside the inner circle.

  • Scoring 3 points for shots made from the outer circle.

Features

  • AI-Assisted Basketball Navigation: The basketball has a built-in AI navigation system, allowing players to adjust the navigation strength via the menu to gradually enhance shooting accuracy.

  • Customizable Ball Properties: Adjust the weight, bounce, resistance, and other attributes to simulate different types of basketballs, creating a shooting experience that suits your personal preferences.

Whether you're a beginner or a pro, you'll find enjoyment and continuous improvement in this game!
